name: Family Friends
overview: A bangla serial starring Nadia Afrin Mim, Mili Basher, Tariq Anam Khan, Rashed Mamun Apu, Aleef Chowdhury, Aynun Putul written by Mezbah Uddin Sumon directed by Habib Shakil. Other actors playing important roles: Mahadi Hasan Pial, Priyontee Urbee, Jibon Roy, Tanay Biswas. Family Friends Title song sung by Ariyan Mehedi, music composed by Ahmed Shobuj

trailers.title: Family Friends | EP 01 | ফ্যামিলি ফ্রেন্ডস | Tariq Anam | Nadia Mim | Mili Basher | Drama Series
